info.title: KISS Notebook API
info.description:
REST API for collaborative Jupyter-like notebook platform.

All successful responses are wrapped in `{"data": ...}`; errors in `{"error": "message"}`.

**Auth flow in Swagger UI:**
1. `POST /api/v1/auth/login` — response sets `session_id` and `csrf_token` cookies.
2. Copy the `csrf_token` cookie value.
3. Click **Authorize**: set `cookieAuth` = `session_id` value, set `csrfToken` = `csrf_token` value.
4. All subsequent mutating requests will include `X-CSRF-Token` header automatically.

get.summary: List notebooks shared with the current user
List permissions granted on a notebook

post.summary: Grant permission to a user by email or username

put.summary: Grant a permission level to a user on a notebook

delete.summary: Revoke a user's permission on a notebook

get.summary: List all comments on a notebook (across all blocks)
List comments on a specific block (cell)

200.description: List of comments for the block

post.summary: Add a comment to a block (cell)

delete.summary: Delete a comment (owner or notebook owner)

post.summary: Execute all blocks from a given position
Stop the runner session (kill container) for a notebook

post.description: Authenticated user submits a feedback issue. Category and content are required. Files are optional (images/docs, max 10 MB each, up to 5 files). The issue is created with status `open` and linked to the current user.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of issues created by the current user. Other users' issues are not included.
Returns full details of one issue including the chat thread. Only the owner of the issue can access it.

delete.description: Permanently deletes the issue and its chat thread. Only the issue owner can do this.

post.summary: Send a message in own issue chat
post.description: Appends a new message to the chat thread of the user's own issue. Only the issue owner can post here. Returns the created message.

201.description: Message created; returns the new chat message

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all issues from all users. Supports filtering by status, category, user ID, and full-text search over content.
Returns aggregate counts of issues broken down by status and category. Intended for the admin analytics page.
Returns full details of any issue including owner username and the full chat thread.

patch.description: Transitions an issue to a new status. The change is idempotent — setting the same status again succeeds without side effects. The admin's user ID and timestamp are recorded.

post.summary: Send admin chat message on an issue (admin only)
post.description: Appends a new message to the issue chat thread on behalf of the admin. Multiple messages accumulate — the thread is visible to both the issue author and admins. Returns the created message.

201.description: Message created; returns the new chat message

PayloadTooLarge.description: Uploaded file exceeds the server limit

identifier.description: Email or username of the user to grant access to

category.description: Type of issue as shown in the UI: Bug / Idea / Problem / Feedback

is_admin.description: True if the message was sent by an admin/support

messages.description: Chat thread; populated only in detail view
Chat thread between user and admin

content.description: Chat message text from the admin
